note: The graph TYPE SYSTEM. The engine/AI builds the investigation graph ONLY from these declared types — it is NOT free-form. A node's `kind` MUST be one of node_types; an edge's `type` MUST be one of edge_types; a node's `health` MUST be one of health_states. This travels with the playbook (the domain's type system). If a needed type is missing, UPDATE this schema + the playbook deliberately — never invent a type ad hoc; if the schema itself is the limitation, raise it for discussion.
